quoteText.en: Recursive functions of symbolic expressions became a working language for artificial intelligence.
quoteText.zh: 符号表达式的递归函数成为人工智能可以实际使用的语言。

workTitle.en: Recursive Functions of Symbolic Expressions and Their Computation by Machine, Part I
workTitle.zh: 符号表达式的递归函数及其机器计算（第一部分）

workAuthors.en: John McCarthy, Communications of the ACM, 1960
